stocks.nameEn: The Chugoku Electric Power Co., Inc.

headlines.title: Japan stocks higher at close of trade; Nikkei 225 up 4.69%
Asia stocks rally as Micron outlook revives AI trade; Korea, Japan lead gains
Micron’s Outlook Sent Japan’s Nikkei To A Record Close
Japanese Yen: Holds near 2024 low against US Dollar – MUFG
Japan Founder Led Stocks With Deep Discounts And Fast Earnings Growth
BREAKING NEWS: Japan's Nikkei stock index ends at record high
Japan govt. panels propose 370 tril. yen investment in key sectors

marketTone.ko: 오늘 일본 증시는 닛케이 225 지수가 4.69% 급등하며 사상 최고치를 경신하는 등 아시아 증시 상승세를 견인했습니다. 마이크론의 긍정적인 전망에 힘입어 인공지능(AI) 관련주가 강세를 보였으며, 저평가된 고성장 창업자 주도 기업들이 시장 상승을 주도했습니다. 또한, 일본 정부 패널들이 주요 부문에 대한 대규모 투자 계획을 제안하며 투자 심리를 더욱 북돋았습니다. 한편, 엔화는 미국 달러 대비 2024년 최저치 부근에서 움직임을 유지했습니다.
marketTone.en: Japanese stocks closed significantly higher today, with the Nikkei 225 surging 4.69% to a record high, leading gains across Asia. This rally was primarily fueled by a revived AI trade, spurred by Micron's optimistic outlook, alongside strong performance from founder-led stocks exhibiting deep discounts and rapid earnings growth. Further bolstering sentiment, Japanese government panels proposed substantial investment in key sectors. Meanwhile, the Japanese Yen continued to hold near its 2024 low against the US Dollar.
